title: The Swinging Clown.
content:
Swing up!
            Swing down!
    Here goes the clown.

            Swing left!
            Swing right!
    Mind you hold tight.

            Swing low!
            Swing high!
    Right to the sky.
meaning:
"The Swinging Clown." is a quintessential example of Richard Hunter's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
